title: Xi Jinping’s warning to Donald Trump during his state visit to China: “If this issue is mishandled, the two countries will clash”

news.title: Xi Jinping’s warning to Donald Trump during his state visit to China: “If this issue is mishandled, the two countries will clash”

world.title: Xi Jinping’s warning to Donald Trump during his state visit to China: “If this issue is mishandled, the two countries will clash”

visualIntent.valueStructure: cool green teal field, central dark drapery, pale face, low ochre pressure, vertical gold fracture

contrast.target: separate pale face, black drapery, ochre pressure, and gold fracture without glossy brightness

workshopAcceptance: Playwright preview succeeded for desktop at previews/attempt-001/001-world-environment-draft-desktop.jpg.

Inspected screenshot shows a dominant muted blue-green Hawkins-like surround, central dark vertical pressure mass, pale warm pressure accents, a thick gold fracture seam, subdued radial halo, and branch/blossom framing.

Render report previews/attempt-001/desktop-render-report.json reports captureStatus ok, healthStatus ok, nonBlankRatio 0.753704, dynamicRange 175, and sceneAssemblyReport.environment.shellCreated false because the authored world-environment part supplied the environment shell.

Self-review confirms the module creates one true skybox shell only, marked immersiveWorldEnvironmentShell/skybox on single-dominant-hawkins-position-space-skybox, with branch, blossom, fracture, and radial supports implemented as ordinary non-enclosing scene geometry.
evidence.selfReview: Accepted: the environment is a real single-shell surrounding artwork with Hawkins palette, soft painterly surface, central warning pressure, and visible fracture tension.
compositionAdaptations: Kept the accepted environment as the only authored skybox shell and used it to hold the muted blue-green field, central dark figure pressure, blossom branches, and vertical gold seam around the viewer.
composition modified world-environment from isolated accepted-part defaults
Kept as the accepted single-shell Hawkins atmosphere, holding the muted blue-green field, central dark pressure, branch/blossom framing, and gold seam.

workshopAcceptance: Concept reference image was inspected directly as advisory-only evidence for muted blue-green palette, central dark vertical figure, lower-left blond pressure profile, branches, blossoms, and gold fracture mood.
Static check succeeded for the final draft with sourceHash 3ccda88b498bbe5b65c6b02e89351a7b91ba8e2a2cee0ea4a650ba288c518a57.

Attempt 3 Playwright desktop preview succeeded: previews/attempt-003/003-non-literal-fracture-pressure-draft-desktop.jpg shows a central dark Hawkins-style warning figure, pale face, lower-left ochre Trump pressure mass, bright vertical gold fracture, radial pressure halos, and branch/blossom framing.
Attempt 3 render report healthStatus ok, captureStatus ok, dynamicRange 210.333, foregroundOccupancyRatio 0.046272, centerForegroundRatio 0.169063, focalDominanceRatio 0.913408.
The module does not create a skybox shell or enclosing dome; it uses ordinary planes, rings, tubes, line segments, and soft point sprites layered over the accepted environment.
evidence.selfReview: Accepted after final preview: the part is a visible, deterministic primary-news-signal carrying non-literal fracture pressure in a muted Louis Welden Hawkins register.
compositionAdaptations: Brought the accepted primary signal slightly forward and larger than the cautious default so the central figure, lower-left Trump pressure, radial halo, and gold fracture remain the first readable subject.
composition modified non-literal-fracture-pressure from isolated accepted-part defaults
Placed as the primary readable center with a larger foreground footprint for the face, lower-left Trump pressure, radial halo, and fracture.

workshopAcceptance: Inspected the available local concept-reference image directly as advisory mood/palette evidence only.
Attempt 1 Playwright preview succeeded but the screenshot read too sparse and dust-like, so the draft was revised for stronger visual footprint.

Attempt 2 Playwright preview succeeded with desktop screenshot previews/attempt-002/002-artist-mark-field-draft-desktop.jpg and render report previews/attempt-002/desktop-render-report.json; render health was ok, capture status ok, dynamic range 203.333, center coverage 0.255188.
Static check-part-draft succeeded with validation pass true and sourceHash 69d9c3b28e7c54ba6f9abafaf6bc2036cc1b715861d8f62fb0287ef19c56616c.
evidence.selfReview: Accepted after revision: the final draft is visibly present, deterministic, non-enclosing, and carries Hawkins matte surface, radial-symbol, branch, flower, and fracture-pressure logic.
compositionAdaptations: After preview inspection, shifted the accepted mark field farther into the right/back supporting band, reduced scale, and widened the world camera so flowers, branch lines, radial marks, and matte wash frame the figure without burying the face or fracture on mobile.
composition modified artist-mark-field from isolated accepted-part defaults
Used as supporting frame texture; after preview inspection, camera was widened so its flowers and radial marks do not overpower the central subject on mobile.

image.altText: Xi Jinping’s warning to Donald Trump during his state visit to China: “If this issue is mishandled, the two countries will clash” by Louis Welden Hawkins.
